goal.description: You are looking for information in Cambridge. You are looking for a train. The train should depart from cambridge and should go to bishops stortford. The train should arrive by 12:45 and should leave on tuesday. Once you find the train you want to make a booking for 4 people. Make sure you get the reference number. You are also looking for a particular hotel. Its name is called alexander bed and breakfast. Once you find the hotel you want to book it for the same group of people and 3 nights starting from saturday. Make sure you get the reference number

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I just need a little help booking a train from cambridge.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Where are you traveling to?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: To Bishops Stortford I need to arrive by 12:45 on Tuesday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: What time do you need to depart and on what day?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I don't care what time I depart as long as I can arrive by 12:45 on Tuesday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Alright perfect! How many people will need tickets?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: I will need 4 tickets please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Your reference number is SIRFMX3O. May I help you with anything else today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Can you find a hotel for me called Alexander Bed and breakfast?

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: That's a 4-star guesthouse in the city centre.  They offer free wifi and parking.  Would you like me to make a reservation for you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Yes, please, for 4 people, for 3 nights, starting Saturday.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: Great! The reference number is ZFGSW8HU, do you need help with anything else?

turns.speaker: user
turns.utterance: Nope, That's all I need. Thank you.

turns.speaker: system
turns.utterance: You're very welcome. Thank you for using Cambridge TownInfo. Goodbye.

goal.description: You are planning your trip in Cambridge. You are looking for a train. The train should leave on wednesday and should go to cambridge. turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system

turns.speaker: user

turns.speaker: system
